name: Chili Tostados
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Cowboy chili or canned refried beans
1 Cup Texas red sauce or original San Antonio chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the tortillas in 1/2 inch of heated oil or shortening until crisp.
2. Spread 1/4 cup Cowboy chili or refried beans on each tortilla.
3. Top with 2 tablespoons Texas red sauce or original San Antonio chili.
4. Add shredded lettuce.
5. Spoon 1/4 cup guacamole and sprinkle chopped tomatoes on top.
Fat grams per serving: Approximately
Cook time: 40 minutes
Makes four servings. From "Famous Chili Recipes from Marlboro Country".
Sometimes I sprinkle a little grated Cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese on top of this, or if I don't have any guacamole handy, I use a little more cheese.
